title: Composition Recipes Catalog
description: Catalog of UI composition recipes (R1-R17 + new R18+) surfaced by Phase 1.5 grounding + Phase 1.6 simulations.

extractedFrom.description: Source documents (Phase 1 grounding artifact + simulation findings)

promotionPolicy.description: Rule for marking recipes as promotion_candidate: true (typically: appears in 5+ sims)

id.description: Recipe identifier (R1-R20, R-prefixed for named patterns)

composition.description: Composition signature in pseudo-tree notation (e.g. Card[Text(h2)+Table+Row[Button×N]])

components_used.description: List of UI component names from component-catalog.json that this recipe uses

anti_patterns.description: What NOT to do for this recipe

validated_by_sims.description: Phase 1.6 simulation transcripts that used this recipe

provenance.description: extracted = from Phase 1 grounding artifact (R1-R17); proposed = new from Phase 1.6 sims; derived = inferred

promotion_candidate.description: True if recipe appears in 5+ sims and may warrant promotion to first-class rich component in Phase 3

variants.description: Related recipe IDs that are variants of this one

extension_slots.description: Named slots that extensions to this recipe may populate

recipe.description: Recipe ID being recommended for promotion

rationale.description: Why this recipe should be promoted to a first-class component

promotionRecommendations.description: Phase 3 recommendations for which recipes to promote to first-class rich components
